templates.title: TCP Port Scanner
templates.description: Scan port mana yang terbuka di host tertentu. stdlib only.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(host, start_port, end_port, timeout={{timeout}}):
    """Scan TCP port range. Return list of open ports."""
    open_ports = []
    for port in range(start_port, end_port + 1):
        sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
        sock.settimeout(timeout)
        result = sock.connect_ex((host, port))
        if result == 0:
            open_ports.append(port)
        sock.close()
    return open_ports
